languages.text: "Это Иждриг Батошски, мой архмилитант. Во время боевых операций он руководит войсками".
"This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."
languages.original_text: "Это Иждриг Батошски, мой архмилитант. Во время боевых операций он руководит войсками".

traits.locale_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my arch-militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

languages.text: "Das ist Izdrig Batoshski, mein Erzmilitant. Er befehligt die Truppen bei Kampfhandlungen."
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist Izdrig Batoshski, mein Erzmilitant. Er befehligt die Truppen bei Kampfhandlungen."

languages.text: « Je vous présente Izdrig Batoshski, mon archimilitant. Il est à la tête des troupes lors des combats. »
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous présente Izdrig Batoshski, mon archimilitant. Il est à la tête des troupes lors des combats. »

languages.text: «Este es Izdrig Batoshski, mi Archimilitante. Está al mando de las tropas durante las operaciones de combate».
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: «Este es Izdrig Batoshski, mi Archimilitante. Está al mando de las tropas durante las operaciones de combate».

languages.text: "Bu İzdrig Batoshski, Başmilitanım. Muharebe operasyonlarında birliklere o komuta ediyor."
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: "Bu İzdrig Batoshski, Başmilitanım. Muharebe operasyonlarında birliklere o komuta ediyor."

languages.text: “这位是伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，我的首席战士。作战期间由他指挥部队。”
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: “这位是伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，我的首席战士。作战期间由他指挥部队。”

languages.text: 「これはイズドリック・バトシュスキー、私の最高軍事顧問です。戦闘時には彼に兵士の指揮を任せています。」
languages.original_text: "This is Izdrig Batoshski, my Arch-Militant. He commands the troops during combat operations."

traits.locale_text: 「これはイズドリック・バトシュスキー、私の最高軍事顧問です。戦闘時には彼に兵士の指揮を任せています。」
